title: 4 Solid Stocks to Buy on Rise in Personal Income, Spending
text: Discretionary stocks like Snap-on (SNA), Rocky Brands (RCKY), Royal Caribbean Cruises (RCL), Live Nation Entertainment (LYV) and Hilton Worldwide Holdings (HLT) are poised to benefit from the jump in personal income and spending.

title: Can Hilton (HLT) Stock Keep the Bull Run Alive in 2024?
text: Hilton (HLT) benefits from improving RevPAR, occupancy and ADR.

title: Hilton's Asset-Light Business Can Continue To Reward Investors
text: Hilton's asset-light franchise model has helped deliver outstanding long-term returns for investors. The pipeline remains robust and growing, with management forecasting an acceleration of up to 6-7% annualized net unit growth after 2024. Between unit growth, RevPAR growth and stock buybacks, Hilton can power the type of EPS growth needed to more than justify its current valuation.

title: Hilton Marks a Decade of Growth Since Initial Public Offering
text: MCLEAN, Va.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hilton (NYSE: HLT) today marked a decade of fast-paced growth since its initial public offering (IPO) on the New York Stock Exchange on Dec. 11, 2013. Over the last 10 years, the more than century-old company has nearly doubled its global property and room count, more than doubled its brand portfolio, more than quadrupled the number of Hilton Honors members worldwide, and delivered total shareholder returns of approximately 330%* – outperforming major indices and i.

title: Waldorf Astoria Orlando Unveils Property-Wide Transformation
text: Award-winning hotel debuts reimagined guestrooms and suites, lobby, signature restaurants, spa, golf course, and meetings and events spaces ORLANDO, Fla. , Dec. 5, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Today, the award-winning  Waldorf Astoria Orlando  unveils a property-wide reimagination that includes a floor-to-ceiling transformation inclusive of all guestrooms and suites, the lobby arrival experience, new design and culinary innovations at the award-winning restaurants Bull & Bear and Peacock Alley, enhancements to The Waldorf Astoria Spa and a complete restoration of the esteemed 18-hole Waldorf Astoria Golf Club.

title: Check-In for Profits: 3 Hotel Stocks Poised for Growth
text: The hotel and hospitality industry took a serious beating during the Covid-19 pandemic. U.S. hotel market valuations dropped from $222.26 billion in 2019 to a measly $127 and $171.1 billion.
